export.description: Server export to mount, e.g. /exports/data (takes precedence over the export in the location URL)

root.description: Path to walk, relative to the mounted export (default: the whole export)

port.description: NFS/MOUNT service port (default: resolved through the portmapper)

uid.description: Numeric UID presented to the server as AUTH_UNIX credential

gid.description: Numeric GID presented to the server as AUTH_UNIX credential
